title: Injecting the male jaw | Create a sharp jawline & reduce a double chin
filename: Injecting the male jaw ｜ Create a sharp jawline & reduce a double chin.en.vtt
excerpt: So when I'm treating jawline I tend to start at one point then do the next and then link the two up it's long aspiration [Music] thank you I'm just augmenting each angle of the chin remember there are two angles women often one done a nice long aspiration I can do also that posit…

segments.text: so when I'm treating jawline I tend to start at one point then do the next and then link the two up it's long aspiration [Music] thank you I'm just augmenting each angle of the chin remember there are two angles women often one done a nice long aspiration I can do also that position slightly and

palpating with the tip of the needle so I can feel the angle of the bone underneath that gives me some confidence about the depth I'm at foreign so this is an interesting part of a male treatment in a female jaw I would not be touching anything here because I don't want it to go any broader but this is actually very similar to my draw and I've thought about this treatment on myself actually which is a little bit of width here with this curving outwards rather than saying straight I mean from this angle which you may never see so well from here it'll look straight but a slight outward curve as if I'm doing that is actually very compatible with a good masculine jawline so I'm going to add a little bit here to it's to really link these two structures as a natural weak point here which I'll be defending against and building that up it helps basically help the jawline win against the cheek in terms
of dominance I want this so 25 gauge um 0.75 0.7 so it's seven centimeters 70 millimeters [Music] foreign [Music] then shows you what you might see
afterwards a little bulge here helps me laughs I'm pointing the cannula tip down [Music] foreign

transcript: so when I'm treating jawline I tend to start at one point then do the next and then link the two up it's long aspiration [Music] thank you I'm just augmenting each angle of the chin remember there are two angles women often one done a nice long aspiration I can do also that position slightly and palpating with the tip of the needle so I can feel the angle of the bone underneath that gives me some confidence about the depth I'm at foreign so this is an interesting part of a male treatment in a female jaw I would not be touching anything here because I don't want it to go any broader but this is actually very similar to my draw and I've thought about this treatment on myself actually which is a little bit of width here with this curving outwards rather than saying straight I mean from this angle which you may never see so well from here it'll look straight but a slight outward curve as if I'm doing that is actually very compatible with a good masculine jawline so I'm going to add a little bit here to it's to really link these two structures as a natural weak point here which I'll be defending against and building that up it helps basically help the jawline win against the cheek in terms of dominance I want this so 25 gauge um 0.75 0.7 so it's seven centimeters 70 millimeters [Music] foreign [Music] then shows you what you might see afterwards a little bulge here helps me laughs I'm pointing the cannula tip down [Music] foreign [Music] thank you [Music] [Music] thank you foreign [Music]
